title: 8 Viewing, Printing, and Saving Cheque Images and AFT Transactions on ORS
body_text:
8	Viewing, Printing, and Saving Cheque Images and AFT Transactions on ORS
8.1	Viewing and Printing Cheque Images on ORS
Use ORS to view and validate Incoming Clearing Items (e.g., verify the Drawerâs signature, check for post-dated or stale-dated items). Physical cheques arenât returned to your financial institution so financial institution staff can use ORS to make pay/no-pay decisions.
Proceed as follows to view and print cheque images of Qualified Incoming Clearing Items on ORS:
Log in to ORS and identify the cheques that you want to view or print. See Section 7.2, Searching for Cheques on ORS.
Check the box in the V column beside each cheque that you want to view (front image only) or print or choose
Select All.
See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select Cheques
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Printing the Front and Back of the Selected Cheque(s) One at a Time
To print the front and back of the selected cheque(s) one at a time:
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Submit Request
Note:	The more items you check, the longer it takes to display the results.
Select the
P
link in the A column to print the cheque image (front and back). See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Search View Page
Note:	Select the
Z
link in the A column to enlarge the cheque image. Select
Z
again to return the cheque image to normal size.
Note:	Images are displayed in the same order as the list of cheques on the Search Results page.
Note:	You can also access the P link from the Search Results page.
Use the browser print function to print the cheque image. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Print Cheque Image
Printing Multiple Cheque Images at the Same Time
To print multiple cheque images at the same time:
Select
Print Selected
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Print Selected
Note:	The images are displayed and printed in the same order as the list on the Search Results page.
Note:	You can also access the Print Selected link from the Search View page.
Use the browser print function to print cheque images. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Print Cheque Images
Related Information
Section 7.2
, Searching for Cheques on ORS
8.2	Viewing and Printing AFT Transactions on ORS
Proceed as follows to view and print the details of AFT transactions on ORS:
Log in to ORS and identify the AFT transactions that you want to view or print. See Section 7.5, Searching for AFT Transactions on ORS.
Check the box in the V column beside each AFT transaction that you want to view or print or choose
Select All
. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Select AFT Transactions
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Printing the Details of the Selected AFT Transactions One at a Time
To print the details of the selected AFT transactions one at a time:
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Submit Request
Note:	The more items you check, the longer it takes to display the results.
Select the
P
link in the A column to print the details of the AFT transaction. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Search View Page
Note:	Details are displayed in the same order as the list on the
Search Results
page.
Note:	You can also access the P link from the Search Results page.
Use the browser print function to print the AFT transaction details. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Print AFT Details
Printing Multiple AFT Transactions at the Same Time
To print multiple AFT transactions at the same time:
Select
Print Selected
. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Print Selected
Note:	The transactions are displayed and printed in the same order as the list on the Search Results page.
Note:	You can also access the Print Selected link from the Search View page.
Use the browser print function to print the AFT transactions. See Figure 12.
Figure 12: Multiple AFT Transactions
Related Information
Section 7.5
, Searching for AFT Transactions on ORS
8.3	Viewing and Printing Cheque Images and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS
Proceed as follows to view and print cheque images of Incoming Clearing Items and the details of AFT transactions simultaneously on ORS:
Log in to ORS and identify the cheques and AFT transactions that you want to view or print. See Section 7.6, Searching for Cheques and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS.
Check the box in the V column beside each cheque or AFT transaction that you want to view or print or choose
Select All
. See Figure 13.
Figure 13: Select Cheques and AFTs
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Printing the Details of the Selected Cheques and AFT Transactions One at a Time
To print the details the selected cheques and AFT transactions one at a time:
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
. See Figure 14.
Figure 14: Submit Request
Note:	The more items you check, the longer it takes to display the results.
Select the
P
link in the A column to print the cheque image (front and back) and the details of the cheque images and AFT transactions.
Note:	Select the
Z
link in the A column to enlarge the cheque image. Select
Z
again to return the cheque image to normal size.
Note:	The cheques and AFT transactions are displayed in the same order as the list on the Search Results page.
Note:	You can also access the P link from the Search Results page.
Use the browser print function to print the cheque image and AFT transaction details.
Printing Multiple Cheques and AFT Transactions at the Same Time
To print multiple cheques and AFT transactions at the same time:
Select
Print Selected
. See Figure 15.
Figure 15: Print Selected
Note:	The cheques and AFT transactions are displayed and printed in the same order as the list on the Search Results page.
Note:	You can also access the Print Selected link from the Search View page.
Use the browser print function to print the cheque images and AFT transaction details.
Related Information
Section 7.6
, Searching for Cheques and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS
8.4	Saving Cheque Image Details from ORS
Proceed as follows to save cheque image details as PDF files from ORS:
Log in to ORS and identify the cheques that you want to save as a PDF file. See Section 7.2, Searching for Cheques on ORS or Section 7.6, Searching for Cheques and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS.
Check the box in the V column beside each cheque that you want to save or choose
Select All
. See Figure 16.
Figure 16: Select Cheques
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Select
Save to File
. See Figure 17.
Figure 17: Save to File
Select
Save
when prompted.
Select the location where you want to save the file and select
Save.
Select
Close
to close the Download Complete dialogue box.
8.5	Saving AFT Transaction Details from ORS
Proceed as follows to save AFT transaction details as PDF files from ORS:
Log in to ORS and identify the cheques and AFT transactions that you want to save as a PDF file. See Section 7.5, Searching for AFT Transactions on ORS.
Check the box in the V column beside each AFT transaction that you want to save or choose
Select All
. See Figure 18.
Figure 18: Select AFTs
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Select
Save to File
. See Figure 17.
Select
Save
when prompted.
Select the location where you want to save the file and select
Save.
Select
Close
to close the Download Complete dialogue box.
Related Information
Section 7.2
, Searching for Cheques on ORS
Section 7.5
, Searching for AFT Transactions on ORS
Section 7.6
, Searching for Cheques and AFT Transactions (Combined Search) on ORS
END
